# The build of watcher takes a fair while due to the size of the dependency
# tree, the size of some of the individual dependencies and the absence of
# caching when building within a test script.
[short] stop 'Skipping long test.'

env HOME=${WORK}

env GOBIN=${WORK}/bin
env PATH=${GOBIN}:${PATH}
cd ${PKG_ROOT}
go install ./cmd/watcher
cd ${WORK}

unquote debug_activity_log.snarf debug_blanking_no_log.snarf debug_blanking_yes_log.snarf

exec watcher -log=DEBUG -debug debug_activity_log.snarf
cmp stdout want_activity_good.text

exec watcher -log=DEBUG -debug debug_blanking_no_log.snarf
cmp stdout want_blanking_no.text

exec watcher -log=DEBUG -debug debug_blanking_yes_log.snarf
cmp stdout want_blanking_yes.text

-- want_activity_good.text --
[{"uid":{"module":"worklog"},"method":"record","params":{"details":{"class":"Gnome-terminal","last_input":"2026-02-14T10:35:21.6+10:30","locked":false,"name":"gnome-terminal-server","pid":4245,"wid":67109097,"window":"Terminal"},"period":"1s"}}]
-- debug_activity_log.snarf --
>-- prg --
>{
>	"uid":    {"module": "worklog"},
>	"method": "record",
>	"params": {
>		"details": {
>			"name":       locked ? "" : name,
>			"class":      locked ? "" : class,
>			"window":     locked ? "" : window,
>			"last_input": last_input,
>			"locked":     locked,
>			"wid":        wid,
>			"pid":        pid,
>		},
>		"period": period,
>	},
>}
>-- data --
>{"time":"2026-02-14T10:35:26.615526645+10:30","level":"ERROR","source":{"function":"main.(*daemon).poll.func1","file":".../watcher/main.go","line":472},"msg":"polling evaluation","component":"watcher","tick":"2026-02-14T10:35:26.612881714+10:30","name":"activity","details":{"wid":67109097,"pid":4245,"name":"gnome-terminal-server","class":"Gnome-terminal","window":"Terminal","last_input":"2026-02-14T10:35:21.6+10:30","locked":false},"last":{"wid":67109097,"pid":4245,"name":"gnome-terminal-server","class":"Gnome-terminal","window":"Terminal","last_input":"2026-02-14T10:35:21.6+10:30","locked":false},"period":1000000000,"error":null,"goid":7}
>
-- want_blanking_no.text --
[{"uid":{},"method":""}]
-- debug_blanking_no_log.snarf --
>-- prg --
>locked == last.locked ? {} : {
>	"method": "sleep",
>	"params": {
>		"action":  "set",
>		"state":   locked ? "blanked" : "awake",
>		"service": {"service":"kernel_pager"}
>	},
>}
>-- data --
>{"time":"2026-02-14T10:35:28.618033931+10:30","level":"ERROR","source":{"function":"main.(*daemon).poll.func1","file":".../watcher/main.go","line":472},"msg":"polling evaluation","component":"watcher","tick":"2026-02-14T10:35:28.612882688+10:30","name":"blanking","details":{"wid":67109097,"pid":4245,"name":"gnome-terminal-server","class":"Gnome-terminal","window":"Terminal","last_input":"2026-02-14T10:35:21.6+10:30","locked":false},"last":{"wid":67109097,"pid":4245,"name":"gnome-terminal-server","class":"Gnome-terminal","window":"Terminal","last_input":"2026-02-14T10:35:21.6+10:30","locked":false},"period":1000000000,"error":null,"goid":7}
>
-- want_blanking_yes.text --
[{"uid":{},"method":"sleep","params":{"action":"set","service":{"service":"kernel_pager"},"state":"blanked"}}]
-- debug_blanking_yes_log.snarf --
>-- prg --
>locked == last.locked ? {} : {
>	"method": "sleep",
>	"params": {
>		"action":  "set",
>		"state":   locked ? "blanked" : "awake",
>		"service": {"service":"kernel_pager"}
>	},
>}
>-- data --
>{"time":"2026-02-14T10:35:28.618033931+10:30","level":"ERROR","source":{"function":"main.(*daemon).poll.func1","file":".../watcher/main.go","line":472},"msg":"polling evaluation","component":"watcher","tick":"2026-02-14T10:35:28.612882688+10:30","name":"blanking","details":{"wid":67109097,"pid":4245,"name":"gnome-terminal-server","class":"Gnome-terminal","window":"Terminal","last_input":"2026-02-14T10:35:21.6+10:30","locked":true},"last":{"wid":67109097,"pid":4245,"name":"gnome-terminal-server","class":"Gnome-terminal","window":"Terminal","last_input":"2026-02-14T10:35:21.6+10:30","locked":false},"period":1000000000,"error":null,"goid":7}
>
